columns.extraction_plan: Abstract (Chunk 8, page 1), the "RESULTS" section (Chunk 8, page 3, and Chunk 9, pages 4-7), Table 1 (Chunk 1, page 5), Table 2 (Chunk 4, page 8), Table 3 (Chunk 5, page 9), Table 4 (Chunk 6, page 10), and Figure 2 (Chunk 2, page 6) and Figure 3 (Chunk 3, page 7) were examined.
